nasb.text: You will have songs as in the night when you keep the festival, And gladness of heart as when one marches to the sound of the flute, To go to the mountain of the Lord, to the Rock of Israel.

esv.text: You shall have a song as in the night when a holy feast is kept, and gladness of heart, as when one sets out to the sound of the flute to go to the mountain of the Lord, to the Rock of Israel.

cnv.text: 你們卻必歌唱，好像守聖節的夜間一樣； 你們必心裡喜樂，好像吹著笛行走的人， 必上耶和華的山，到以色列的磐石那裡。

ccb.text: 但你们必欢唱，好像晚上庆祝节期；你们必充满喜乐，好像人们吹着笛子登耶和华的山、到以色列磐石那里。

csbs.text: 而你们却会歌唱， 像守圣节的夜晚那样； 并会心里喜乐， 像人伴着笛声行走， 上耶和华的山， 到以色列的磐石那里。
